name: meta-skill
description: Create custom AI skills with guaranteed completeness and optimized retrieval. Uses TDD + Anti-Rationalization Pressure Testing + Blind Comparison for completeness, and redundancy removal + ambiguity clarification + progressive disclosure for AI retrieval efficiency.
